From one hall to a landmark.

Twenty-five years in four chapters. Swipe through our journey.

2001
Where it all began.

A humble ground-floor hall with a hand-painted sign — રાધિકા ભુવન — and one big dream.

2015
A new home rises.

We built our new multi-storey banquet building — a proud moment for our whole family.

2018
Growing even bigger.

The expansion begins — more halls, more rooms, more space for your celebrations.

TODAY
A landmark on Waghodia Road.

Three halls, a conference hall, a disco floor and 15 guest rooms — 25 years strong.

Three halls. Endless occasions.

Pick the space that fits your celebration.

First Floor

Grand Hall.
Made for big days.

Our largest hall — grand weddings, receptions and celebrations with all your loved ones under one roof.

Second Floor

Royal Hall.
Elegance, elevated.

Beautiful stage décor and a refined setting — perfect for engagements, ring ceremonies and receptions.

Third Floor

Celebration Hall.
Joy lives here.

Bright and full of life — birthdays, baby showers, haldi functions and every happy family gathering.

Business Ready

Conference Hall.
Meetings, handled.

Projector, screen and flexible seating — corporate events and seminars, minus the hassle.
